title: Oxydectes garckeana
taxonomy: Oxydectes garckeana is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is often found in shaded areas. The classification of Oxydectes garckeana places it within the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. The species name garckeana is derived from the German botanist Johann Friedrich Klotzsch's assistant, Carl August Gustaf von Garcke. This plant's classification is still being researched and updated in the field of botany.
